surface.why_relevant: App-server-backed operator flows remain highly volatile and materially shape what a user can observe and resume.
analysis_implications: Review tui_app_server alongside app-server as a coupled operator surface.
Pay attention to resumed history and startup-state parity.
recent_signals: Plugin visibility and startup-state flows are becoming richer.
